summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Project Centurion - 100Cr Engine revenue milestone prediction platform. All major features working excellently with glassmorphism navbar, 4 free calculators, and 9-module dashboard fully functional.
passed_tests: Glassmorphism navbar with centered design and backdrop-blur styling
Free Tools dropdown with all 4 calculators (100Cr, ARR, Runway, Growth)
Dashboard Command Centre loading at /dashboard with milestone countdown and health score
Dashboard sidebar showing all 9 modules with proper navigation
Revenue Intelligence page with charts and performance metrics
Forecasting Engine with scenario sliders and projection charts
Benchmark Intelligence with percentile display features
Reporting Engine with report types functionality
AI Growth Coach with daily pulse and mock AI responses
Goal Architecture with milestone ladder features
Investor Relations with dilution modeller content
API Connectors with trust header and provider cards (Razorpay, Stripe, etc.)
Mobile responsiveness with working navbar toggle and bottom navigation
Founder Plan badge display in sidebar
Mock data displaying correctly across all dashboard modules
